intro: Urochondra setulosa, also known as Indian staff vine, is a climbing plant native to tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties.
